# SECURITY POLICY

llamux is MIT-licensed. We welcome responsible disclosure.

Reporting vulnerabilities
- Use GitHub Security Advisories if you have access, or contact the project maintainers via the repository's security channel.
- Include a clear description, steps to reproduce, affected version(s), and any relevant logs or test outputs.
- If you cannot reach the project maintainers, consider using a public advisory publication channel after initial private disclosure.

Response and remediation
- We will acknowledge receipt of a report within 3 business days.
- We will triage the report, reproduce the issue, and provide a timeline for remediation.
- We will coordinate with the reporter on the disclosure timeline and, when appropriate, publish a security advisory.

Scope
- This policy applies to llamux code and related tooling released under the MIT license.
- We aim to fix high-severity issues promptly and transparently, while protecting users who may rely on the project.

Responsible disclosure
- Do not publicly disclose vulnerabilities without coordinating with the maintainers.
- If you need to discuss confidential details, use a secure channel provided by the maintainers (e.g., private GitHub issue or verified contact).

Contact
- For urgent concerns, use the repository's security channel or email the maintainers:
- GitHub: https://github.com/JediRhymeTrix
